front.title: PACE: Protocol for Agent Communication Exchange

abstract.t: This document defines the Protocol for Agent Communication Exchange (PACE), a session protocol for AI agent communication over Media over QUIC Transport (MOQT). PACE provides session lifecycle management, multi-modal data exchange, agent identity verification, and delegated authorization within MOQT's publish/subscribe model, supporting point-to-point and point-to-multipoint topologies through relay infrastructure.
